name: workerd-oxc
description: Experimental Oxc parser and transform adapter for Cloudflare workerd.

scripts.build:direct-parser: cargo build --manifest-path native/oxc-direct-parser/Cargo.toml --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && cp native/oxc-direct-parser/target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/workerd_oxc_direct_parser.wasm src/wasm/oxc-direct-parser.wasm
scripts.test: vitest run --config vitest.config.ts && vitest run --config vitest.workers.config.ts
